research_notes: Found executive information on company profile page (https://www.sgb.co.jp/company/). President: 代表取締役 渡邊一平. Established 2015-06-01, capital 20M yen, 41 employees. HQ in Yokohama (都筑区) with Tokyo office (目黒区). System development, food business divisions. Philosophy: 新しい価値を創造する (Creating new value). Also mentions 代表メッセージ from 渡邊.
